2604.05955.title: Does Pass Rate Tell the Whole Story? Evaluating Design Constraint Compliance in LLM-based Issue Resolution
2604.05955.paper_summary: Repository-level issue resolution benchmarks have become a standard testbed for evaluating LLM-based agents, yet success is still predominantly measured by test pass rates. In practice, however, acceptable patches must also comply with project-specific design constraints, such as architectural conventions, error-handling policies, and maintainability requirements, which are rarely encoded in tests and are often documented only implicitly in code review discussions. This paper introduces \textit{design-aware issue resolution} and presents \bench{}, a benchmark that makes such implicit design constraints explicit and measurable. \bench{} is constructed by mining and validating design constraints from real-world pull requests, linking them to issue instances, and automatically checking patch compliance using an LLM-based verifier, yielding 495 issues and 1,787 validated constraints across six repositories, aligned with SWE-bench-Verified and SWE-bench-Pro. Experiments with state-of-the-art agents show that test-based correctness substantially overestimates patch quality: fewer than half of resolved issues are fully design-satisfying, design violations are widespread, and functional correctness exhibits negligible statistical association with design satisfaction. While providing issue-specific design guidance reduces violations, substantial non-compliance remains, highlighting a fundamental gap in current agent capabilities and motivating design-aware evaluation beyond functional correctness.
2604.05955.paper_summary_zh: 儲存庫層級的問題解決基準已成為評估基於 LLM 的代理的標準測試平台，但成功仍主要通過測試通過率來衡量。<lb/>然而，在實踐中，可接受的修補程式還必須遵循特定於項目的設計約束，例如架構慣例、錯誤處理政策和可維護性要求，這些通常在測試中很少編碼，並且通常僅在代碼審查討論中隱含記錄。<lb/>本文介紹了 \textit{設計感知的問題解決}，並呈現了 \bench{}，這是一個使這些隱含設計約束明確且可衡量的基準。<lb/> \bench{} 是通過挖掘和驗證來自現實世界的拉取請求中的設計約束來構建的，將其與問題實例鏈接，並使用基於 LLM 的驗證器自動檢查修補程式的合規性，產生了 495 個問題和 1,787 個驗證的約束，涵蓋六個儲存庫，與 SWE-bench-Verified 和 SWE-bench-Pro 對齊。<lb/>與最先進的代理進行的實驗顯示，基於測試的正確性大大高估了修補程式的質量：解決的問題中不到一半完全滿足設計要求，設計違規現象普遍存在，功能正確性與設計滿意度的統計關聯微不足道。<lb/>雖然提供特定於問題的設計指導可以減少違規行為，但仍然存在大量不合規的情況，突顯了當前代理能力中的根本差距，並促使在功能正確性之外進行設計感知的評估。
2604.05955.author: Kai Yu et.al.
2604.05955.authors: Kai Yu, Zhenhao Zhou, Junhao Zeng, Ying Wang, Xueying Du, Zhiqiang Yuan, Junwei Liu, Ziyu Zhou, Yujia Wang, Chong Wang, Xin Peng
